name: 1TAM-MD
description: 1TAM-MD WhatsApp Multi-Device Bot with AI Chat

SESSION_ID.description: Your bot session ID. Get it by running the bot locally once and scanning the QR code, then run: node getSession.js

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + or spaces. Example: 2348012345678

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for AI chat. Get free key at: aistudio.google.com/app/apikey

PUBLIC_MODE.description: Allow anyone to use the bot (true = public, false = contacts only)

TIMEZONE.description: Your timezone e.g. Africa/Lagos, America/New_York, Asia/Kolkata
